base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of spell_fireball_expanded — a effect_layer (atmospheric_vfx) from 1986 dragon quest. follow-on frames of fire-pillar showing roll/dissipation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5-frame larger flame-wave — follow-on frames of fire-pillar showing roll/dissipation
